subcodes.first_line: O son of the devoted one! Be thou the vanguard of the people of the Covenant and the sovereign of the world of light. Praise be unto God that at the sacred Threshold [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ابن دخیل سرخیل اهل میثاق باش و سرور جهان اشراق حمد خدا را که در آستان مقدس
subcodes.subjects: @prayers (general or uncategorized), @firmness in the Covenant, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @call to action
